brief: Trump escalates election security claims against China as Japan revises royal succession rules; a school bus crash in Uganda kills 20; new studies examine academic networking and writing positioning.
news_summary: US launches more strikes on Iran as Trump alleges election vulnerabilities; Telstra boss admits outage affected 45% of calls; Uganda school bus crash kills 20; Japan keeps male-only succession.
papers_summary: Studies on academic networking amid precarity and positioning patterns in L2 argumentative writing are featured.

en.brief: Trump escalates election security claims against China as Japan revises royal succession rules; a school bus crash in Uganda kills 20; new studies examine academic networking and writing positioning.
en.news_summary: US launches more strikes on Iran as Trump alleges election vulnerabilities; Telstra boss admits outage affected 45% of calls; Uganda school bus crash kills 20; Japan keeps male-only succession.
en.papers_summary: Studies on academic networking amid precarity and positioning patterns in L2 argumentative writing are featured.

zh.brief: 今日重點包括特朗普政府收緊外國學生簽證、指控中國干預選舉，以及皮尤調查顯示全球對中國好感度上升。另有關於霍爾木茲海峽替代路線的討論。
zh.news_summary: 特朗普政府宣布收緊外國學生簽證規定，並指控中國干預2020年選舉，與美情報機構結論矛盾。皮尤調查顯示全球更多國家對中國好感勝過美國。
zh.papers_summary: 無優先中文論文，英文論文探討學術網絡轉型與L2學生寫作中的定位模式。

todays_image.caption: The mid-20th century ballot box symbolizes a trusted system for public voice, just as Telstra’s admission of network fallibility and the retirement of a trusted news anchor remind us that all channels of communication are subject to change
todays_image.title: Ballot box, mid-20th century
